ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or organization the team represents */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the team (e.g., Varsity, Junior Varsity) */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach assigned to the team */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager assigned to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the squad belongs to */,
  "squad_coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach assigned to the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squads_squad_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squads_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "athlete_email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "athlete_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team competing in the race */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the squad competing in the race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event in which the race took place */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the team in the race */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or points received based on the race outcome */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_results" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race result */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete in the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the athlete in the race */,
  "personal_best" TEXT /* Personal best time of the athlete for the race distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event takes place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., track, field, road race) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
